title: slideotter
summary: A local browser studio for structured decks with fast previews, guarded edits, and one DOM render path.
note: Editing loop: capture context, generate options, compare, apply deliberately, validate.

cards.title: Structured content
cards.body: Slides use compact JSON specs so content stays readable and easy to validate.

cards.title: One render path
cards.body: One DOM renderer powers previews, thumbnails, exported images, and the PDF.

cards.title: Guarded workflow
cards.body: Workflow actions generate session candidates, show diffs, and require explicit apply.
